description: Crystal Raiders Patch 4 (11 March 2024) — Turkish and Arabic Added, Server Names Changed, Mobile Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Turkish and Arabic Added

items.text: These languages are selectable from within the launcher or via the in-game Settings menu
Dedicated chat channels have been added to the game for these languages
Forthcoming news articles will appear in these languages
To report translation issues for these or other supported languages, please use this forum thread: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/87904

sections.searchable_text: Turkish and Arabic Added These languages are selectable from within the launcher or via the in-game Settings menu Dedicated chat channels have been added to the game for these languages Forthcoming news articles will appear in these languages To report translation issues for these or other supported languages, please use this forum thread: forum.albiononline.com/index.php/Thread/87904

sections.heading: Server Names Changed
sections.searchable_text: Server Names Changed Albion East → Albion Asia Albion West → Albion Americas

sections.heading: Mobile Changes

items.text: [ANDROID] Vulkan can now be enabled via the settings menu for devices which support this

sections.searchable_text: Mobile Changes [ANDROID] Vulkan can now be enabled via the settings menu for devices which support this

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs

subitems.text: The cooldown reduction is not 5s anymore, but always reduces cooldown by 50% instead

subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Flame Pillar (Great Fire Staff) The cooldown reduction is not 5s anymore, but always reduces cooldown by 50% instead

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Earth Shatter (Hammers) Damage: 55.58 → 66.6 Ground Pound (Grovekeepers) Range: 14m → 16m

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Battle Howl (Heavy Mace) Cooldown: 18s → 20s Vendetta (Camlann Mace) Range: 21m → 23m Cooldown: 30s → 25s

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Hyper Focus (Feyscale Hat) Cooldown: 30s → 20s Duration: 7s → 5s Immortal (Mistwalker Hood) Duration: 5s → 6s Purifying Smoke (Helmet of Valor) Cooldown: 45s → 40s

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Energy Source (Royal Armor) Max targets: 5 → 10

subsections.heading: Capes
subsections.searchable_text: Capes Fey Barrier (Brecilien Cape) Shield Value: 200 → 230 Opening to Hell (Demon Cape) Damage vs players: 50 → 55 Damage vs mobs: 29 → 31.9 Sandstorm (Bridgewatch Cape) Crowd Control Resistance Reduction Factor: 0.2 -> 0.3

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Fire Staffs Flame Pillar (Great Fire Staff) Hammers Earth Shatter (Hammers) Ground Pound (Grovekeepers) Maces Battle Howl (Heavy Mace) Vendetta (Camlann Mace) Helmets Hyper Focus (Feyscale Hat) Immortal (Mistwalker Hood) Purifying Smoke (Helmet of Valor) Armors Energy Source (Royal Armor) Capes Fey Barrier (Brecilien Cape) Opening to Hell (Demon Cape) Sandstorm (Bridgewatch Cape)

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Innate Power (Shapeshifter Staffs): Fixed issue where charges continued to be applied even after switching to a different passive
Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade): Range is now 18m, as intended

items.text: Fixed issue where UIs could scroll unpredictably
Fixed issue where spell audio could persist after cast canceled
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Spell fixes Innate Power (Shapeshifter Staffs): Fixed issue where charges continued to be applied even after switching to a different passive Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade): Range is now 18m, as intended Fixed issue where UIs could scroll unpredictably Fixed issue where spell audio could persist after cast canceled Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
